description.p: Armies require protection, and someone has to put things back together if defenses fail. A Battle Smith is an expert at defending others, repairing the wounded, and fighting alongside a steel defender of their own creation.
You gain proficiency with Smith's Tools. If you already have this proficiency, you gain proficiency with one other type of Artisan's Tools of your choice.
Weapon Crafting. When you craft a nonmagical or magic weapon, the amount of time required to craft it is halved.
When you reach an Artificer level specified in the Battle Smith Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared.
You gain proficiency with Martial weapons.
When you attack with a magic weapon, you can use your Intelligence modifier, instead of Strength or Dexterity, for the attack and damage rolls.

sheet.description: When you attack with a magic weapon, you can use Intelligence instead of Strength or Dexterity for the attack and damage rolls. You can use a weapon with which you have proficiency as a Spellcasting Focus for your Artificer spells.

description.p: Your tinkering has borne you a companion, a Steel Defender. You determine the defender's appearance and whether it has two legs or four; your choices don't affect the defender's game statistics.
The defender is friendly to you and your allies and obeys you. It vanishes if you die.

The Defender in Combat. In combat, the defender acts during your turn. It can move and take its Reaction on its own, but the only action it takes is Dodge unless you take a Bonus Action to command it to take an action. If you have the Incapacitated condition, the defender acts on its own and isn't limited to the Dodge action.

Restoring or Replacing the Defender. If the defender has died within the last hour, you can take a Magic action to touch it and expend a spell slot. The defender returns to life after 1 minute with all its Hit Points restored.
Whenever you finish a Long Rest, you can create a new defender if you have Smith's Tools in hand. If you already have a defender from this feature, the first one vanishes.

sheet.description: The Steel Defender acts during your turn. It Dodges unless you use a Bonus Action to command it to take an action. If it died within the last hour, you can take a Magic action to touch it and expend a spell slot; it returns to life after 1 minute with all its Hit Points restored. You can have only one Steel Defender.

description.p: You can attack twice instead of once whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.
You can forgo one of your attacks when you take the Attack action to command your Steel Defender to take the Force-Empowered Rend action.

sheet.description: When you take the Attack action, you can attack twice, or forgo one attack to command your Steel Defender to take the Force-Empowered Rend action.

description.p: When either you hit a target with a magic weapon attack or your Steel Defender hits a target, you can channel magical energy through the strike to create one of the following effects:
Damage. The target takes an extra {{arcane jolt:dice:amount}}d6 Force damage.
Healing. Choose one creature or object you can see within 30 feet of the target. Healing energy flows into the chosen recipient, restoring {{arcane jolt:dice:amount}}d6 Hit Points to it.
You can use Arcane Jolt a number of times equal to your Intelligence modifier (minimum once), but no more than once on a turn. You regain all expended uses when you finish a Long Rest.

sheet.description: Once per turn, when you or your Steel Defender hit a target, you can deal {{arcane jolt:dice:amount}}d6 extra Force damage to that target or restore {{arcane jolt:dice:amount}}d6 Hit Points to one creature or object you can see within 30 feet of it.

description.p: Your Arcane Jolt and Steel Defender become more powerful.
Improved Jolt. The extra damage and healing of Arcane Jolt both increase to {{arcane jolt:dice:amount}}d6.
Improved Deflection. Whenever your Steel Defender uses Deflect Attack, the attacker takes 1d4 + your Intelligence modifier Force damage.

sheet.description: Whenever your Steel Defender uses Deflect Attack, the attacker takes 1d4 + {{intelligence:modifier}} Force damage.

description.p: Your Steel Defender is a Medium Construct that obeys your commands.
Its attack roll uses your spell attack modifier.

setters.set: 5 + five times your artificer level (the defender has a number of Hit Dice [d8s] equal to your artificer level)
STR +2, DEX +1, CON +2, INT -3, WIS +0, CHA -2

description.p: Add your Proficiency Bonus to any ability check or saving throw the defender makes.

sheet.description: Add your Proficiency Bonus to any ability check or saving throw the defender makes.

description.p: Melee Attack Roll: Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1d8 + 2 plus your Intelligence modifier Force damage.

sheet.description: Melee Attack Roll: Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1d8 + 2 plus your Intelligence modifier Force damage.

description.p: The defender, or one Construct or object it can see within 5 feet of itself, regains 2d8 plus your Intelligence modifier Hit Points.

sheet.description: The defender, or one Construct or object it can see within 5 feet of itself, regains 2d8 plus your Intelligence modifier Hit Points.

description.p: The defender imposes disadvantage on the attack roll of one creature it can see that is within 5 feet of it, provided the attack roll is against a creature other than the defender.

sheet.description: The defender imposes Disadvantage on the attack roll of one creature it can see that is within 5 feet of it, provided the attack roll is against a creature other than the defender.

ul.li: Hit Points 5 + five times your artificer level (the defender has a number of Hit Dice [d8s] equal to your artificer level)
Saving Throws Str +2, Dex +1, Con +2, Int -3, Wis +0, Cha -2
Languages understands the languages you know
Steel Bond. Add your Proficiency Bonus to any ability check or saving throw the defender makes.
Force-Empowered Rend. Melee Attack Roll: Bonus equals your spell attack modifier, reach 5 ft. Hit: 1d8 + 2 plus your Intelligence modifier Force damage.
Repair (3/Day). The defender, or one Construct or object it can see within 5 feet of itself, regains 2d8 plus your Intelligence modifier Hit Points.
Deflect Attack. The defender imposes disadvantage on the attack roll of one creature it can see that is within 5 feet of it, provided the attack roll is against a creature other than the defender.
